lessons.title: Beast Gauge & Tempest
lessons.description: Learn Warrior's core mechanics: Beast Gauge generation, maintaining Surging Tempest buff, and basic combo flow.
keyPoints: Beast Gauge builds from your weapon skill combo (10 per combo action)
Surging Tempest: 10% damage buff from Storm's Eye combo finisher
Keep Surging Tempest active at all times - it's your main damage buff
Don't overcap Beast Gauge at 100 - spend it on Fell Cleave
tips: Alternate between Storm's Path (gauge) and Storm's Eye (buff refresh)
Surging Tempest can be extended up to 60s - don't over-refresh

lessons.title: Defensive Fundamentals
lessons.description: Master WAR's defensive toolkit: Rampart, Vengeance, and the powerful Bloodwhetting self-heal.
keyPoints: Rampart: 20% mitigation for 20s (90s CD) - standard tank cooldown
Vengeance: 30% mitigation + damage reflect for 15s (120s CD)
Bloodwhetting: 10% mitigation + massive healing on attacks (25s CD)
Bloodwhetting makes WAR nearly immortal during large pulls
tips: Bloodwhetting is your best dungeon cooldown - heals scale with targets hit
Combine Vengeance with AoE attacks for reflect damage in dungeons

lessons.title: Holmgang
lessons.description: Master Warrior's invulnerability: Holmgang timing, target requirements, and coordinating with healers.
keyPoints: Holmgang: Cannot drop below 1 HP for 10s (240s CD)
Shortest cooldown of all tank invulns - can be used frequently
You WILL drop to 1 HP - healers must heal you after
Binds you to target for duration - can limit movement
tips: Use Holmgang aggressively due to its short cooldown
Bloodwhetting after Holmgang can self-heal you back up

lessons.title: Inner Release
lessons.description: Master WAR's burst window: Inner Release setup, Fell Cleave spam, and maximizing damage during the window.
keyPoints: Inner Release: Free Fell Cleaves and guaranteed crits for 15s (60s CD)
Spam Fell Cleave during Inner Release - no Beast Gauge cost
Infuriate: Grants 50 Beast Gauge (60s CD) + Nascent Chaos buff
Fit 5 Fell Cleaves minimum in each Inner Release window
tips: Pool Beast Gauge before Inner Release for even more damage
Inner Release + Primal Rend is your biggest burst combo

lessons.title: Self-Sustain
lessons.description: Master WAR's incredible self-healing: Thrill of Battle, Equilibrium, and Bloodwhetting synergies.
keyPoints: Thrill of Battle: +20% max HP + healing for 10s (90s CD)
Equilibrium: Strong self-heal + HoT (60s CD)
Nascent Chaos: Inner Chaos instead of Fell Cleave (from Infuriate)
WAR can self-sustain through most content with proper cooldown use
tips: Thrill before big damage maximizes healing received
Inner Chaos is your strongest single hit - use in burst windows

lessons.title: Party Protection
lessons.description: Master WAR's party utility: Shake It Off for party shields and Nascent Flash for ally protection.
keyPoints: Shake It Off: Party shield that scales with active buffs (90s CD)
Nascent Flash: Share your Bloodwhetting healing with a party member
Shake It Off removes Rampart/Vengeance/etc. but makes bigger shield
Coordinate party mitigation with healers and co-tank
tips: Use Shake It Off before letting buffs expire naturally
Nascent Flash on a DPS during Bloodwhetting keeps them alive

lessons.title: Advanced Optimization
lessons.description: Final lesson: gauge pooling, tank swaps, oGCD weaving, and maximizing damage while maintaining survivability.
keyPoints: Pool gauge to 50-80 before Inner Release for maximum burst
Primal Rend: Granted by Inner Release, huge damage, can be delayed
Upheaval: Strong oGCD (30s CD) - weave on cooldown
Onslaught: Gap closer with 3 charges - use for movement or damage
tips: Primal Rend can be held up to 30s for raid buff alignment
Use all 3 Onslaught charges during burst windows if possible
